6770364.title: Needle Mountains

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Mountain range in Colorado, United States

6770364.description: Mountain range in Colorado, United States
6770364.extract: The Needle Mountains are a subrange of the San Juan Mountains of the Rocky Mountains located in the southwestern part of the U.S. State of Colorado. Much of the range is protected in the Weminuche Wilderness of the San Juan National Forest.  The range is notable for having some of the most rugged mountains in the state, and includes many technical climbs and scrambles.  A small but dramatic east–west subrange in the northern section is known as the Grenadier Range.
